mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ITEM WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY item_no DESC
SELECT i.*, i.pay_status FROM WISHLIST w JOIN ITEM i ON w.item_no = i.item_no WHERE w.user_no = #{userNo} AND i.STATUS != 'D'
SELECT * FROM BOARD_POST WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY board_no DESC
SELECT r.reply_no, r.reply_content, r.reply_date, b.board_no, b.board_title FROM REPLY r JOIN BOARD_POST b ON r.board_no = b.board_no WHERE r.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY r.reply_date DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.report_no, r.target_type, r.target_no, r.status, r.created_at, c.REPORT_CATEGORY AS categoryName, i.item_title AS targetTitle, NULL AS replyContent, NULL AS boardNo FROM REPORT r JOIN ITEM i ON r.target_no = i.item_no JOIN REPORT_CATEGORY c ON r.report_cd_no = c.REPORT_CATEGORY_NO WHERE r.target_type = 'item' AND r.user_no = #{userNo} UNION ALL SELECT r.report_no, r.target_type, r.target_no, r.status, r.created_at, c.REPORT_CATEGORY AS categoryName, b.board_title AS targetTitle, NULL AS replyContent, NULL AS boardNo FROM REPORT r JOIN BOARD_POST b ON r.target_no = b.board_no JOIN REPORT_CATEGORY c ON r.report_cd_no = c.REPORT_CATEGORY_NO WHERE r.target_type = 'board' AND r.user_no = #{userNo} UNION ALL SELECT r.report_no, r.target_type, r.target_no, r.status, r.created_at, c.REPORT_CATEGORY AS categoryName, NULL AS targetTitle, rp.reply_content AS replyContent, rp.board_no AS boardNo FROM REPORT r JOIN REPLY rp ON r.target_no = rp.reply_no JOIN REPORT_CATEGORY c ON r.report_cd_no = c.REPORT_CATEGORY_NO WHERE r.target_type = 'reply' AND r.user_no = #{userNo} ) t ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT user_no, user_id, user_name, user_address, user_phone, user_email, user_enroll_date FROM MEMBER WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
SELECT F.*, C.CATEGORY_NAME FROM FAQ F JOIN FAQ_CATEGORY C ON F.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID WHERE F.USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY F.CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_FAQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO FAQ (FAQ_ID, USER_NO, CATEGORY_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, FILE_PATH) VALUES (#{faqId}, #{userNo}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{filePath})
mapper.select: SELECT F.*, C.CATEGORY_NAME, M.USER_NAME FROM FAQ F JOIN FAQ_CATEGORY C ON F.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID JOIN MEMBER M ON F.USER_NO = M.USER_NO WHERE F.FAQ_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FAQ_IMG (FILE_ID, FAQ_ID, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, FILE_PATH) VALUES (SEQ_FAQ_IMG.NEXTVAL, #{faqId}, #{originName}, #{changeName}, #{filePath})
mapper.select:
SELECT i.item_no, i.item_title, i.current_price, i.end_time, i.views, i.pay_status, (SELECT MIN(img_url) FROM ITEM_IMG WHERE item_no = i.item_no) as img_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BID WHERE item_no = i.item_no AND BID_STATUS = 'N') as bidCount FROM ITEM i WHERE i.STATUS = 'E' AND #{userNo} = ( SELECT MAX(user_no) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY bid_price DESC, bid_time DESC) FROM BID WHERE item_no = i.item_no AND BID_STATUS = 'N' ) ORDER BY
i.current_price DESC i.current_price ASC
CASE WHEN i.pay_status = 'N' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, i.end_time DESC
CASE WHEN i.pay_status IN ('Y', 'S', 'P') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, i.end_time DESC
i.end_time DESC

SELECT i.item_no, i.item_title, i.current_price, i.end_time, i.views, p.pay_no as paymentNo, p.pay_status as payStatus, (SELECT m.user_id FROM BID b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.user_no = m.user_no WHERE b.item_no = i.item_no AND b.bid_price = i.current_price AND ROWNUM = 1) as buyerId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BID b WHERE b.item_no = i.item_no) as bidCount, (SELECT MIN(img_url) FROM ITEM_IMG WHERE item_no = i.item_no) as imgUrl, CASE WHEN p.pay_status = 'Y' THEN '결제 완료' WHEN p.pay_status = 'S' THEN '배송 중' WHEN p.pay_status = 'P' THEN '거래 완료' ELSE '취소됨' END as statusText FROM ITEM i JOIN PAYMENT p ON i.item_no = p.item_no WHERE i.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY p.approved_at DESC
